title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 21 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 21 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 21 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 21/08/2024
Iron ore futures opened high and moved higher, with the most-traded contract I2501 surging significantly to close at 742, up 4.58% for the day.Traders' enthusiasm for selling increased noticeably. Steel mills were more cautious, with average purchasing intentions. The overall market transaction atmosphere was acceptable today.
